steps.title: Expand the right side
steps.content:
Rewrite the equation so the coefficients and constants can be compared.
$$
7x+4=a(x+b)
$$
$$
7x+4=ax+ab
$$

steps.title: Make the coefficients match
steps.content:
A linear equation has no solutions when the $x$-coefficients match but the constants do not. Matching the $x$-coefficients requires
$$
a=7
$$

steps.title: Keep the constants different
steps.content:
With $a=7$, the right-side constant is $7b$. To avoid infinitely many solutions, the constants cannot match.
$$
7b\ne 4
$$
$$
b\ne \frac{4}{7}
$$

steps.title: Identify the required statements
steps.content: Statement I is required, statement II is not required, and statement III is required. The answer is D.
